message:
feat(engine): add 12 enrichment integration test suites and expand 17 source modules

New enrichment integration test suites (12 files):
- activation_lifecycle_enrichment_integration.rs
- alloc_domain_enrichment_integration.rs
- ambient_authority_enrichment_integration.rs
- array_fast_lane_enrichment_integration.rs
- cancel_mask_enrichment_integration.rs
- cancellation_lifecycle_enrichment_integration.rs
- canonical_encoding_enrichment_integration.rs
- containment_executor_enrichment_integration.rs
- regime_shift_detector_enrichment_integration.rs
- seqlock_rollout_guard_enrichment_integration.rs
- signature_preimage_enrichment_integration.rs
- ts_shipped_path_evidence_enrichment_integration.rs

New fixture: lockstep_canon_rules.toml

Source module expansions (17 modules):
- counterfactual_replay_engine, flow_lattice, ifc_artifacts,
  seqlock_rollout_guard, ts_normalization_evidence,
  stdlib_workload_verification, esm_cjs_parity_evidence,
  module_live_binding, persistent_cache_contract,
  react_repro_triage, regime_signature_feature,
  rgc_planning_track, timescale_separation_certificate,
  budget_propagation_contract, entropy_evidence_compressor,
  minimized_repro_extraction, franken_lockstep_runner

Existing test expansions (10 files):
- benchmark_behavior_equivalence, benchmark_e2e, bytecode_vm,
  checkpoint_frontier_deep, franken_lockstep_runner_cli,
  ifc_artifacts, ifc_declassification_runtime,
  module_compatibility_matrix, parser_event_ast_equivalence,
  security_e2e, session_hostcall_channel_deep

Scripts: expanded lockstep runner + module interop verification
Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1518,7 +1518,12 @@ mod tests {
         let alt_b = make_alternate_policy("alt-1", "description-b");
 
         let result_a = engine_a
-            .compare(&[trace.clone()], &[alt_a], &default_scope(), None)
+            .compare(
+                std::slice::from_ref(&trace),
+                &[alt_a],
+                &default_scope(),
+                None,
+            )
             .unwrap();
         let result_b = engine_b
             .compare(&[trace], &[alt_b], &default_scope(), None)

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+schema_version = "franken-engine.lockstep-canon-rules.v1"
+
+[[rules]]
+rule_id = "normalize-newlines"
+kind = "newline_normalization"
+description = "Normalize CRLF and CR line endings before observable output comparison."
+
+[[rules]]
+rule_id = "trim-engine-stack-noise"
+kind = "stack_trace_noise"
+description = "Strip engine-specific stack-frame prefixes and locations from thrown error output."
+
+[[rules]]
+rule_id = "collapse-whitespace-runs"
+kind = "whitespace_normalization"
+description = "Collapse repeated whitespace in diagnostic and console output comparison surfaces."

@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ fixture_catalog="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_FIXTURE_CATALOG:-crates/franken-engine/tests/
 fixture_limit="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_FIXTURE_LIMIT:-8}"
 fixture_id="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_FIXTURE_ID:-}"
 runtime_specs="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_RUNTIME_SPECS:-}"
+canon_rules="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_CANON_RULES:-crates/franken-engine/tests/fixtures/lockstep_canon_rules.toml}"
 seed="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_SEED:-7}"
 fail_on_divergence="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_FAIL_ON_DIVERGENCE:-0}"
 allow_critical_drift="${LOCKSTEP_RUNNER_ALLOW_CRITICAL_DRIFT:-0}"
@@ -216,6 +217,7 @@ run_report_step() {
       --policy-id "$policy_id" \
       --locale C \
       --timezone UTC \
+      --canon-rules "$canon_rules" \
       --preflight-only
   )
 
@@ -287,6 +289,7 @@ run_report_step() {
       --policy-id "$policy_id" \
       --locale C \
       --timezone UTC \
+      --canon-rules "$canon_rules" \
       --out "$report_path" \
       --evidence-jsonl "$evidence_path" \
       --governance-actions-out "$governance_actions_path" \
@@ -451,6 +454,7 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "  \"fixture_limit\": \"${fixture_limit}\","
     echo "  \"fixture_id\": \"${fixture_id}\","
     echo "  \"runtime_specs\": \"${runtime_specs}\","
+    echo "  \"canon_rules\": \"${canon_rules}\","
     echo "  \"seed\": ${seed},"
     echo "  \"fail_on_divergence\": ${fail_on_divergence},"
     echo "  \"allow_critical_drift\": ${allow_critical_drift},"

@@ -112,14 +112,16 @@ run_step() {
   fi
 
   remote_exit_code="$(rch_remote_exit_code "$log_path" || true)"
-  if [[ -n "$remote_exit_code" && "$remote_exit_code" != "0" ]]; then
+  if [[ -z "$remote_exit_code" ]]; then
+    echo "rch output missing remote exit marker; failing closed" | tee -a "$log_path"
     rm -f "$log_path"
-    failed_command="${command_text} (remote-exit=${remote_exit_code})"
+    failed_command="${command_text} (missing-remote-exit-marker)"
     return 1
   fi
-  if [[ -z "$remote_exit_code" ]]; then
-    echo "==> warning: missing remote exit marker; relying on rch process exit status" \
-      | tee -a "$log_path"
+  if [[ "$remote_exit_code" != "0" ]]; then
+    rm -f "$log_path"
+    failed_command="${command_text} (remote-exit=${remote_exit_code})"
+    return 1
   fi
 
   rm -f "$log_path"
